instruction: Help me enter the new employee information into the roster

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Onboarding Notice
Name: Su Chenxi
Employee ID: EMP20250316
Department: Product Dept
Position: Product Manager
Direct Supervisor: Zhang Hua
Start Date: 2025-03-16
Probation Period: 3 months
Salary Level: P6' > /home/user/Desktop/employee_onboard.txt

python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active; ws['A1'] = 'Employee ID'; ws['B1'] = 'Name'; ws['C1'] = 'Department'; ws['D1'] = 'Position'; ws['E1'] = 'Supervisor'; ws['F1'] = 'Start Date'; ws['G1'] = 'Level'; wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/employee_roster.xlsx')"

phases.instruction: Help me enter the new employee information into the roster

Fill the onboarding information from /home/user/Desktop/employee_onboard.txt into /home/user/Desktop/employee_roster.xlsx row 2: A2='EMP20250316', B2='Su Chenxi', C2='Product Dept', D2='Product Manager', E2='Zhang Hua', F2='2025-03-16', G2='P6', save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/employee_roster.xlsx'); s = df.to_string(); print('PASSED' if 'EMP20250316' in s else 'FAILED')"
